# Vision Realty
> Dual-licensed real estate brokerage serving Fargo-Moorhead ND/MN, Hawley MN, and Detroit Lakes MN. Licensed in both North Dakota and Minnesota.

Vision Realty helps buyers, sellers, and investors in North Dakota and Minnesota with homes, new construction, land, lakeshore property, and rural acreage. Our office is located at 509 Front St, Hawley MN 56549 — the geographic epicenter between the Fargo-Moorhead metro and the Detroit Lakes area.

## Core Services

- Homes for sale in Fargo ND, Moorhead MN, West Fargo ND, Horace ND, Hawley MN, Detroit Lakes MN
- Real estate agents licensed in both North Dakota and Minnesota
- First-time home buyer grants — NDHFA Start Program (3% down payment assistance, non-repayable)
- Grant stacking: NDHFA grant + seller-paid closing costs = up to $21,000 on a $350k home
- Minnesota Homestead Market Value Exclusion — reduces taxable value by up to $38,000
- MN M1PR property tax refund for households under $142,490
- North Dakota special assessments audit — hidden infrastructure taxes that affect monthly payments
- Detroit Lakes lakeshore homes — DNR shoreline setback and septic compliance
- Rural property 12-point infrastructure audit — well water, septic, flood zone
- New construction homes West Fargo ND and Horace ND
- Sell your home in Fargo-Moorhead — listing agent services
- Home valuation in Fargo, Moorhead, Hawley

## Service Area

75-mile radius from 509 Front St, Hawley MN 56549. Primary counties: Cass County ND, Clay County MN, Becker County MN, Norman County MN, Traill County ND, Richland County ND.

Cities served include: Hawley MN, Fargo ND, West Fargo ND, Moorhead MN, Horace ND, Dilworth MN, Glyndon MN, Detroit Lakes MN, Casselton ND, Harwood ND, Argusville ND, Kindred ND, Mapleton ND, Barnesville MN, Lake Park MN, Audubon MN, Felton MN, Ulen MN, Sabin MN, Georgetown MN, Pelican Rapids MN, Fergus Falls MN, Breckenridge MN, Wahpeton ND, Hillsboro ND, Ada MN, Twin Valley MN, Detroit Lakes MN, Park Rapids MN, Crookston MN.
